title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at FedEx India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at FedEx India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FedEx India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About FedEx India:
FedEx India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FedEx India!
